name: app-web-user-account
description: Pryv user-account web app: authentication flows and self-service account management (profile, security/MFA, connected apps, data rights). Reference implementation, themeable and meant to be self-hosted by operators.
author: Pryv <info@pryv.com> (https://pryv.com)

scripts.build:pages: tsc -b && vite build --base=/app-web-user-account/ && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html && touch dist/.nojekyll
